ddls:
CREATE TABLE "global_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each global policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., cleanup, timestamping) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the policy is enabled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Global retention period for MSSQL connection metadata, in days */,
  "cleanup_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of cleanup (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "timestamping_type" TEXT /* Type of timestamping (e.g., local, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanup_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanup policy */,
  "channel_database_cleanup_days" INTEGER /* Global retention time for the metadata of MSSQL connections, in days */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the cleanup policy is enabled */,
  "archive_cleanup_days" INTEGER /* Number of days before archived metadata is cleaned up */,
  "delete_cleanup_days" INTEGER /* Number of days before deleted metadata is permanently removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamping_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamping policy */,
  "selection" TEXT /* Configures local or remote timestamping (e.g., local, remote) */,
  "timestamp_format" TEXT /* Format of the timestamp (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection-specific policy */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the connection the policy is associated with */,
  "archive_cleanup_policy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the archive cleanup policy is enabled for the connection */,
  "local_cleanup_days" INTEGER /* Connection-specific retention time for the metadata, in days */,
  "local_timestamping" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if local timestamping is enabled for the connection */,
  "override_global_policy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the connection policy overrides the global policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_policies_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSSQL connection */,
  "connection_name" TEXT /* Name of the MSSQL connection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the connection the metadata is associated with */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the change was made to */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the change was made to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the old values */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* JSON object containing the new values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., policy compliance, metadata summary) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the report data */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
